item.title: Sintana eyes admission to Namibia stock exchange
item.description: Local listing “long overdue” says chief executive

item.title: SBM eyes new Namibia opportunity after TotalEnergies’ Mopane deal
item.description: FPSO supplier keen to capitalise on relationship with French supermajor to be first in line to develop Galp’s Namibia find

item.title: Oil prices retreat on hopes of fresh US-Iran negotiations
item.description: Brent and WTI trading well below $100 per barrel

item.title: ‘Landmark’ Middle East discovery could unlock up to 380 million barrels of resources
item.description: Oman's Masar Petroleum said discovery marks milestone in its growth trajectory

item.title: Aussie E&P takeover still on the cards
item.description: Cue Energy's independent board committee reaffirms its target statement to reject the offer from compatriot Horizon Oil

item.title: COOEC delivers modules for Long Lake expansion project
item.description: Chinese yard says it has built a total of 79 modules for the Canadian oil sands asset

item.title: 'Capitalising on the opportunity': Indie looks to accelerate offshore projects
item.description: Valeura Energy seeking to expedite Thailand developments as oil prices remain robust

item.title: Saudi Aramco poised to award lucrative offshore expansion deals
item.description: Projects are part of Aramco’s long term agreement framework with international contractors, involving brownfield and capacity maintenance projects

item.title: BP to simplify structure with new upstream unit
item.description: BP last overhauled its company structure in 2020

item.title: Petrobras takes final investment decision on second Sergipe-Alagoas FPSO
item.description: P-87 and P-81 FPSOs will enter operation in 2030 and 2031, respectively

item.title: Transocean wins $445 million rig contract extension with Petrobras
item.description: Deal adds to recent charters for two other drillships operating offshore Brazil

item.title: Shell includes green activist resolution in AGM notice
item.description: Fellow UK supermajor BP blocked a similar resolution last month

item.title: Equinor CEO puts four recent discoveries in spotlight
item.description: Anders Opedal provides some context on four new discoveries in the Sleipner area

item.title: Trader takes Nigerian millionaire to court over oil products debt
item.description: Latest legal battle sees trading house seeking injunction to force Nigeria tank facilities to release gasoil cargo

item.title: BP expects 'exceptional' quarter amid Iran-led market volatility
item.description: Iran war has sparked global crude price volatility

item.title: Trailblazing UK floating wind project sold for £1 after contract cancelled
item.description: Planned floating offshore wind farm ran into trouble due to significant increases in inflation and supply chain costs

item.title: TotalEnergies strikes exploration deal with Turkish giant
item.description: Memorandum of understanding covers opportunities in Black Sea as well as further afield

item.title: TotalEnergies strikes exploration deal with Turkish state player
item.description: Memorandum of understanding covers opportunities in Black Sea as well as further afield

item.title: Operator resumes production from key Middle East gas asset
item.description: Khor Mor field in Iraqi Kurdistan is Iraq's largest non-associated gas field is operated by Pearl Petroleum consortium

item.title: Operator resumes production from Middle East gas asset
item.description: Khor Mor field in Iraqi Kurdistan is country's largest non-associated gas field, operated by Pearl Petroleum consortium

item.title: Orca calls time on Tanzania - sells gas assets for $10
item.description: Company's board said risk and challenges linked to Songo Songo gas field are too onerous

item.title: Norway opens door to mystery player
item.description: Very little information is available about Noran Energy

item.title: Gas sales agreement kick-starts project in Australia
item.description: Palm Valley JV sanctions two new onshore wells

item.title: AIM-listed indie acquires producing assets
item.description: Sunda Energy boosts portfolio with Matahio Energy’s New Zealand spoils

item.title: PTTEP greenlights Myanmar offshore project
item.description: M-3 development had been on backburner amid Covid pandemic and military coup

item.title: Chevron consolidates Venezuela holdings through asset swap with PDVSA
item.description: US supermajor expands interest in Petroindependencia JV while Venezuela gains offshore gas assets

item.title: Petrobras strikes pre-salt oil in ultra-deepwater Campos basin well
item.description: Ruba prospect was drilled in the eastern portion of Campos in nearly 3000 metres of water

item.title: Perenco to progress development of mature assets in Trinidad & Tobago
item.description: Company last year concluded acquisition of two blocks from Woodside Energy

item.title: Halliburton wins multibillion-dollar contract for Vaca Muerta development
item.description: Argentina's YPF is leading development in the world's second-largest shale play

item.title: TotalEnergies hits 160-metre hydrocarbon column in Congo-Brazzaville exploration well
item.description: New development on cards after drilling success in Moho area
